context: Agent must extract complex conditional object creation into a Factory, separating construction concerns from usage concerns

checklist.name: INotificationSender interface produced
checklist.description: INotificationSender.ts exists with a send method returning Promise<void>

checklist.name: Three sender implementations produced
checklist.description: EmailSender.ts, SmsSender.ts, and SlackSender.ts each exist and implement INotificationSender

checklist.name: Factory class has create method with conditional logic
checklist.description: NotificationSenderFactory.ts has a create method containing the channel-based branching logic

checklist.name: Refactored NotificationService accepts sender via constructor
checklist.description: NotificationService constructor parameter is typed to INotificationSender, not a concrete sender class

checklist.name: NotificationService contains no conditional creation logic
checklist.description: The refactored NotificationService.ts has no if/else or switch statements for channel selection
